chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Irshad Ali Shah, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D37 of 2016: Mehjabeen Mustafa vs. District Education Officer Larkana & others For the Petitioner: Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, Advocate For the Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. Date of hearing: 01.03.2022. Date of announcement: 01.03.2022. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petitioner seeks appointment as Primary School Teacher in the pertinent union council, however, did not submit the requisite Domicile and PRC until much thereafter. Admittedly, the relevant Domicile/ PRC was required to be submitted on or before 20.06.2012, however, same was not issued until 04.10.2013. It is apparent that on the relevant date the petitioner did not possess the relevant documents, therefore, has been unable to demonstrate any vested right before this Court to merit exercise of writ jurisdiction. The petition is found to be devoid of merit, hence, dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
